home.eyebrow: Family stays in the heart of the city
home.title: Résidence Amira welcomes you with comfort and convenience.
home.lead: Discover curated homes with spacious interiors, modern amenities, and a warm atmosphere for short or extended stays.
home.featuredTitle: Some of our most loved properties
home.emptyFeatured: No featured properties are available right now.

properties.title: Available properties
properties.lead: Browse our selection of comfortable homes for a relaxing stay.
properties.empty: No properties are available at the moment.

about.title: Welcome to Résidence Amira
about.p1: Résidence Amira is a welcoming rental destination designed for travelers who value comfort, location, and thoughtful hospitality.
about.p2: We focus on clean, modern spaces and dependable service so guests can enjoy a calm, convenient home base for business trips, family visits, or longer stays.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.lead: Have questions about availability or a stay? Share a few details and we will be in touch shortly.
contact.name: Name

bookingForm.title: Request a stay
bookingForm.caption: Choose your dates and send a booking request.
bookingForm.dateHelp: Unavailable dates are highlighted by the booking calendar.
bookingForm.submittedMessage: A request has been sent for property #{propertyId}.
bookingForm.fillRequired: Please fill in all required booking details.
bookingForm.checkOutLater: Check-out must be later than check-in.
bookingForm.overlapError: Those dates overlap with an existing booking. Please choose a different range.
bookingForm.submittedSuccess: Your booking request has been submitted successfully.
bookingForm.submitError: Unable to submit the booking request right now.

propertyDetail.submitted: Your booking request has been sent successfully.
propertyDetail.submitError: Unable to submit your booking request right now.
propertyDetail.confirmLead: Please review the booking details before sending your request.

errors.chooseDates: Please choose both check-in and check-out dates.
errors.validGuests: Please enter a valid number of guests.
errors.datesUnavailable: Those dates are unavailable; please choose a different range.
